zh.lifeSummary: 當Gundred de la Ferte於大約1201年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布利其沃特時，她的父親William de la Ferte38歲，母親Margaret De Briwere30歲。她於1217年與Payne de Chaworth在英國格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1237年之後在英國英格蘭維爾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gundred de la Ferte于大约1201年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特布利其沃特时，她的父亲William de la Ferte38岁，母亲Margaret De Briwere30岁。她于1217年与Payne de Chaworth在英国格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1237年之后在英国英格兰維爾爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Ferte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Dino, Domenic, Domenico, Salvatore, Santo, Saverio.
Italian (Berté): probably from a short form of the personal name Bertiere, a derivative of Berto .

variants.name: Berto
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mario, Jose Cruz, Manuel, Virgilio.  Italian Dario, Mauro, Vito.
Italian: from the personal name Berto, a short form ofany of various ancient Germanic names formed with bert (fromberht ‘bright, famous’), for example Alberto,Gilberto, Norberto, Roberto, Umberto.
Hungarian (Bertó): from a pet form of the personalname Bertalan, Hungarian form of Bartholomew .

nameMeanings.name: Gundred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gundry
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Gondri, Gundric, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans, composed of the ancient Germanic elements gund ‘battle’ + rīc ‘power(ful)’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Gundred de la Ferte was born about 1201, in Bridgwater, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de la Ferte, was 38 and her mother, Margaret De Briwere, was 30. She married Payne de Chaworth in 1217, in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1237, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gundred de la Ferte est née environ 1201, à Bridgwater, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de la Ferte, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Briwere, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Payne de Chaworth en 1217, à Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1237, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1217 in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England Payne de Chaworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1237 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Gundred de la Ferteが約1201年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトブリドグワターで生まれた時，父William de la Ferteは38歳，母Margaret De Briwereは30歳であった。1217年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアケンプスフォードでPayne de Chaworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1237年以後にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gundred de la Ferte(이)가 대략 1201년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브리지왓어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de la Ferte(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret De Briwere(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1217년 영국 그루스스터실르 케프스퍼드에서 Payne de Chaworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1237년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gundred de la Ferte nasceu aproximadamente 1201, em Bridgwater, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de la Ferte, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Briwere, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Payne de Chaworth em 1217, em Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1237, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gundred de la Ferte родилась около 1201 г. в местности бриджвэитир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de la Ferte было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Briwere, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Payne de Chaworth в 1217 г. в местности кемпсфорд, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1237 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Payne de Chaworth en 1217, en Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1237, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
